finding_results.notes: Noor now reaches the cafeteria corridor in the same scene, directly sees the wounded raider, watches Lena's people finish the kill, and sees the body dragged to Stairwell A.
Marcus's relay-message reaction is rebuilt around Julie, Maddie, and the garage door without repeating the style-bible calibration cadence.
The cafeteria death is no longer secondhand. Noor witnesses the wounds, the bleed-out, the body position, the smell, the sound of blood on tile, and the disposal into the stairwell.
The Marcus dialogue now avoids the old statement-identification-repetition structure and shifts into concrete family detail instead.
The earlier hand-inventory echo is gone. Chapter 8 keeps only one primary-cluster rack callback and moves the rest of the infrastructure beat onto the secondary-cluster reveal.
Marcus's withdrawal is now concentrated into four main beats: initial state and vomiting, the HVAC cramp, the degraded cluster reveal, and the effort required to get upright for the relay message.
The fluorescent-light description has been rewritten and no longer repeats the earlier 'without warmth' or 'without variation' phrasing.
Post-revision check puts Chapter 8 at zero prose lines with em-dashes.
Post-revision sentence-start check puts the chapter at 11 'She' openers, well under the packet threshold.
Vague 'something' placeholders were replaced with named observations; post-revision count is zero.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_08.md:33; chapters/chapter_08.md:41; chapters/chapter_08.md:43; chapters/chapter_08.md:45; chapters/chapter_08.md:49; chapters/chapter_08.md:59; chapters/chapter_08.md:61; chapters/chapter_08.md:79; chapters/chapter_08.md:81; chapters/chapter_08.md:85
finding_results.notes: Four passages revised across the Marcus interrogation scene. (1) HVAC resumption at line 33 now fragments mid-list with a lip-wetting break. (2) Secondary cluster reveal at lines 41-49 is interrupted by a yawn that costs him the thread, a forearm seizure, and a dry heave; Noor prompts 'Not all of it' to keep the information moving. (3) UPS shutdown procedure at line 59 fragments mid-phrase ('batteries right there with--') with a cognitive stall; Noor now states 'And the dock is Lena's' at line 61, contributing knowledge rather than receiving a briefing. (4) Mechanical room overview at lines 79-85 is broken into short fragments ('Compressors. Air handlers.') with a cramp interrupting the lock-system explanation; Noor infers the tactical implication at line 81 (cluster + HVAC in one room = dual target) rather than Marcus delivering a complete tactical analysis. No multi-sentence technical briefing now passes without physical interruption, and Noor extracts the key operational conclusion from partial answers.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 8 was structurally revised to bring the cafeteria raid and death fully onto the page through Noor's direct perception, while preserving the chapter's planned engine: Marcus's withdrawal, the secondary-cluster reveal, Lena's control of the dock, and the family-message rupture. The Marcus relay beat was rebuilt to avoid the style-bible echo, withdrawal proof was compressed into four concentrated passages, and the chapter-level prose tics flagged in the packet were reduced below threshold.

Single finding addressed: Marcus's withdrawal-scene dialogue fragmented across four passages to eliminate clean sequential systems briefings. Physical interruptions (forearm seizure, dry heave, cramps, cognitive stalls) now break every technical disclosure. Noor contributes two operational conclusions she formerly received passively: the Lena territorial obstacle and the tactical value of the mechanical sublevel housing both compute and HVAC. All essential information (cluster location, ~30% compute share, UPS battery shutdown, separate lock system) remains legible. Setups (secondary_cluster), payoffs (marcus_addiction), family messages, cafeteria killing, and Oxy confession scenes are untouched.
